tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: A volcano is an opening in the Earth's surface 1.1. _________ hot melted rock can escape. Deep below the ground, the temperature is 1.2. _________ high that rock melts into a thick liquid called magma. Because this liquid is lighter 1.3. _________ the solid rock around it, it slowly rises towards the surface. 1.4. _________ the pressure becomes too great, the volcano erupts. During an eruption, magma 1.5. _________ forced out onto the surface, where it is known as lava. Some eruptions are gentle, 1.6. _________ others are extremely violent and dangerous. Ash thrown 1.7. _________ the air can travel for thousands of kilometres. Although volcanoes 1.8. _________ destroy whole towns, they also create rich soil 1.9. _________ which crops grow well. This is one reason 1.10. _________ so many people still choose to live near them.
